arts.ttl: Antony's agent hits out at Man United's Amorim
arts.sum: Antony's agent says he "completely disagrees" with Manchester United coach Rubem Amorim's analysis that his client lacks the physicality needed to compete in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man Utd in talks with Gotham FC over Geyse loan
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Geyse says "staying in a place where we don't feel happy is an agonising and lonely feeling".

arts.ttl: Manchester United official at Fenerbahçe today – Travels to Istanbul for 19-year-old
arts.sum: Manchester United have sent a scout to Istanbul to watch Yusuf Akçiçek as Fenerbahçe take on Rangers in the Europa League. That’s according to journalist Yağız Sabuncuoğlu, who reports that Manchester United are watching the 19-year-old centre-back. arts.ttl: Manchester United injury boost offers Ruben Amorim two clear positives vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Man United head coach will be able to call upon the services of Toby Collyer for the first time in a month against Real Sociedad.
